mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position_info ( position_name, position_level, base_salary, description, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{positionName}, #{positionLevel}, #{baseSalary}, #{description}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT position_id, position_name, position_level, base_salary, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM position_info WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT p.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level, p.base_salary, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) AS employee_count FROM position_info p LEFT JOIN assignment_info a ON p.position_id = a.position_id AND a.status = 'active' WHERE p.status != 'deleted' GROUP BY p.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level, p.base_salary, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at ORDER BY p.position_id ASC

SELECT p.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level, p.base_salary, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) AS employee_count FROM position_info p LEFT JOIN assignment_info a ON p.position_id = a.position_id AND a.status = 'active' WHERE p.position_id = #{positionId} AND p.status != 'deleted' GROUP BY p.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level, p.base_salary, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) FROM assignment_info a WHERE a.position_id = #{positionId} AND a.status = 'active'
